examples: He was the builder of the Great Pyramid of Giza, erroneously attributed to Cheops.
The great Pyramid of Cheops has been described as the most spectacular wonder of the world.
There was a sequence of pharaohs culminating around 2615 BC, with the Pharaoh Cheops who built the biggest thing, the Great Pyramid, also known as Khufu.
The Characterising Exoplanets Satellite -- or Cheops -- will target nearby, stars already known to have potential targets in their orbit.
